subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, assured and steadfast leaf, utmost praise is rendered for thy constancy and firmness. Therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه زائره نهایت ستایش از استقامت و ثبوت شما مینماید پس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
